data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) commits 9ff23a0c31aa, b8a2cad10821, 6510d0135647 are on main; (2) dialog width changed from w-[80vw]/max-w-[80vw] to w-[95vw]/max-w-[1600px]/sm:max-w-[1600px], correctly overriding DialogContent's sm:max-w-lg base class; (3) regression test added verifying the width string; (4) CI and Coverage Badge runs both green on 6510d01. No invariants defined. No regressions detected.
